## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss content production, SEO strategies, and new product initiatives for Hotel Engine.](https://fathom.video/share/bTjyECutdusxdmDcM9faBQB9qntYtzsz?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production is on track with 5 weeks ahead and regular weekly output](https://fathom.video/share/bTjyECutdusxdmDcM9faBQB9qntYtzsz?tab=summary&timestamp=142.0)
  - [Experimenting with LLM.txt and robots.txt strategies for SEO optimization](https://fathom.video/share/bTjyECutdusxdmDcM9faBQB9qntYtzsz?tab=summary&timestamp=249.0)
  - [New RoomBlocks.com domain planned for wedding-specific content and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/bTjyECutdusxdmDcM9faBQB9qntYtzsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1576.0)
  - [Adjustments needed for content specificity, CTA components, and tracking](https://fathom.video/share/bTjyECutdusxdmDcM9faBQB9qntYtzsz?tab=summary&timestamp=1398.0)

## Topics

### Content Production Status
